episodes.title: ଓଡ଼ିଶା ପୁଅର ଭୟଙ୍କର କାରନାମା | Abhishek Mishra Arrested In Mathura For Blackmailing & Exploitation
episodes.description:
ଓଡ଼ିଶା ପୁଅର ଭୟଙ୍କର କାରନାମା ଶୁଣିଲେ ଆପଣ ବି ଆଶ୍ଚର୍ଯ୍ୟ ହୋଇଯିବେ। ଆଇଆଇଟି ଭଳି ବଡ଼ କଲେଜରୁ ଇଞ୍ଜିନିୟରିଂ ପାସ୍ କରିବା ପରେ ଭୁବନେଶ୍ୱରର ଅଭିଷେକ ମିଶ୍ର ଚାକିରି ଛାଡ଼ି 'ଭଣ୍ଡ ବାବା' ସାଜିଥିଲେ। ସେ ନିଜର ନାଁ 'ଆଦିକର୍ତ୍ତା ନାରାୟଣ ଦାସ' ରଖି ମଥୁରାର ରାଧା କୁଣ୍ଡରେ ଏକ ଆଶ୍ରମ ତିଆରି କରିଥିଲେ। ଅଭିଷେକ ୟୁଟ୍ୟୁବ୍ ଓ ଲିଙ୍କଡଇନ୍ ମାଧ୍ୟମରେ ଉଚ୍ଚଶିକ୍ଷିତ ଯୁବକ-ଯୁବତୀମାନଙ୍କୁ ନିଜ କଥାରେ ଫସାଇ ଆଶ୍ରମକୁ ଆଣୁଥିଲେ ଏବଂ ସେଠାରେ 'ଗାନ୍ଧର୍ବ ବିବାହ' କରାଇ ନିଜର ଭୁଲ୍ କାମକୁ ଧର୍ମର ରୂପ ଦେଉଥିଲେ। 
In a shocking incident, an IIT Roorkee engineering graduate from Bhubaneswar, Odisha, identified as Abhishek Mishra, has been arrested for operating a fake ashram and exploiting innocent people. Fleeing his corporate career, he re-christened himself as 'Adikarta Narayan Das' and established an ashram at Radha Kund in Mathura.
Abhishek allegedly used social media platforms like YouTube and LinkedIn to lure highly educated youth, brainwashing them to leave their families. According to police reports, he conducted forced 'Gandharva marriages' inside the ashram to legitimize his illegal acts. Following a complaint by a 22-year-old nursing student from Chhattisgarh—who accused him of spiking her prasad, recording compromising videos, and blackmailing her for 25 lakh rupees—the police raided the ashram, rescued three individuals, and arrested the fraud baba. Watch the full report to know the complete inside story.
#IITianFakeBaba #AbhishekMishra #Mathura #FraudBaba
